name: Spinner
description: Indeterminate loading indicator for processes without a known completion percentage.

size.description: Visual size of spinner. `default` is treated as `medium` (legacy alias).

aria-label.description: Accessible loading label announced by screen readers.

role.description: ARIA role applied to the root element; stories commonly use `status` in loading contexts.

announcerInterval.description: Interval in milliseconds for repeated aria announcements while loading.

announcerTimeout.description: Time in milliseconds after which repeated announcements stop.

completionAnnouncement.description: Announcement spoken when spinner unmounts; set `null` to suppress completion message.

id.description: Optional id forwarded to the internal spinner SVG for deterministic identification.

className.description: Custom class names applied to the root element.

slots.none: Spinner does not accept content slots.

aria: Set contextual `aria-label` to describe what is loading
Completion message is announced on unmount unless `completionAnnouncement={null}`
You may set `role="status"` in app contexts where live status semantics are preferred
